The subsequent rows present $650B with a P/E ratio of 14.2, and $700B with a P/E ratio of 16.5, along with their respective
metrics. The net interest margin stands at 3.45%, with a yield on loans at 5.10%. The asset quality ratios indicate 1.25% in non-
performing loans, while liquidity ratios show current assets of $50B and long-term liabilities. The return on assets is reported at
1.20%, return on equity at 12.00%, loan-to-deposit ratio at 85.00%, debt-to-equity at 1.75, cost of funds at 1.00%, operating
margin at 30.00%, P/E ratio at 15.5, and the efficiency ratio. The Tier 1 ratio is 12.50%, total capital ratio is 15.00%, liquidity
coverage is 120.00%, net stable funding is 105.00%, asset turnover is 0.05, market share is 20.00%, operating income totals
$3B, and total dividends are included. Additionally, the net interest income is $6.9B, total assets are $200B, net loans are
$150B, total deposits amount to $175B, and equity capital is $25B, with an annualized growth of 5.00% and a credit default
swap at 0.85%.
